name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in Gaffer

labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen instead.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce. A minimal repo/ticket that triggers it helps a lot.

```
1.
2.
3.
```

## Which surface

- [ ] `dispatch` (control plane)
- [ ] `crew` (runtime)
- [ ] `memory` / `memory-mcp`
- [ ] `runner` (orchestrator / skills / safety hook)
- [ ] other / not sure

## Environment

- OS:
- Node version (`node -v`):
- pnpm version (`pnpm -v`):
- Gaffer commit (`git rev-parse --short HEAD`):

## Logs / output

Paste relevant logs. **Redact any secrets, tokens, or private repo content.**
